ogTitle: Fowlers Bay vs Fox: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Fowlers Bay and Fox.
heading: Fowlers Bay vs Fox — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Fowlers Bay, South Australia and Fox, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Fox has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Fowlers Bay (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Fowlers Bay or Fox safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Fowlers Bay has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Fox scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Fowlers Bay scores 58/100 for bushfire risk. Fox scores 31/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Fowlers Bay or Fox?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Fox has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.48% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
